bounded_findings: PubMed lists DOI 10.1056/NEJMc2605962, title 'Retraction: Bronchial Casts from Inhalation of Forest-Fire Smoke. N Engl J Med 2026;394:1634.', publication types 'Letter, Retraction Notice', and a CommentsCorrections link 'RetractionOf' to 'N Engl J Med. 2026 Apr 23;394(16):1634. doi: 10.1056/NEJMicm2518379.'.
claim_ceiling_effect: Strengthens public retraction-status corroboration and original/retraction role separation, but still does not expose NEJM notice reasoning text.
next_safe_route: Only a materially different public NEJM notice surface, accepted manuscript mirror, or equivalent publisher-originating public record changes the row beyond metadata/index corroboration.
paper_thesis_use: Methods appendix and hostile-reviewer note on how blocked publisher pages can still have public medical-index corroboration with explicit record roles.
dashboard_hook: Blocked-notice asymmetry panel; public-index corroboration facet; research-integrity source-depth ladder.
caution: Do not infer editorial reasoning or image-manipulation details from PubMed publication types and linkage alone.

bounded_findings: Crossref lists the corrigendum title 'Corrigendum to “Breeding distrust: The biopolitics of chronic wasting disease in white-tailed deer”', DOI 10.1177/25148486241258320, update-to DOI 10.1177/25148486241235821 with type correction and source publisher, while direct PDF/XML probes still return 403.
claim_ceiling_effect: Confirms a publisher-deposited correction record and relation target, but still remains below direct corrigendum text because all SAGE content endpoints tested are Cloudflare-blocked.
next_safe_route: Only a materially different public SAGE notice surface, repository mirror, or publisher-originating record with visible correction text changes this row beyond correction metadata plus mediated editor statement.
paper_thesis_use: Methods/results note distinguishing blocked-notice metadata visibility from direct notice text for research-integrity rows.
